content:
```yaml
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: nethermind
      el_image: ethpandaops/nethermind:glamsterdam-devnet-5
  cl:
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:deathstar
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:glamsterdam-devnet-5-699d0f4 # <-- faulty lodestar that supports deathstar
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:glamsterdam-devnet-5
    - cl_type: prysm
      cl_image: local/prysm-beacon-chain:5222fix
network_params:
  preset: mainnet
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1

additional_services:
  - dora
```
so the prysm from my branch votes correctly, same as lodestar, now the deathstar blocks are getting reorged
